body_preview:
Perhaps, but I realize that unexpected events happen all the time and the
last time I submitted an application to the blossom it sat unprocessed for
several months, and that there have been many construction delays, and that
Clackamas county seems to not apprehend the law enough to want to issue a 2
bedroom voucher and is expecting to take me to court

On Mon, Mar 30, 2026 at 9:40 AM Parkside Heights <
parksideheights@quantumres.com> wrote:

>

> end of April.  Would you still be interested?
